## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, passwords, API keys, private keys, raw database URLs, or unredacted tokens are included.
- [ ] Real trading, swapping, signing, and money movement remain disabled.
- [ ] Multi-user isolation is preserved.
- [ ] Audit output is redacted and user-readable.
